name: garret
description: Garret — a macOS desktop layer for developer focus: ambient widgets above the wallpaper, a summon-over-everything HUD, and keyboard-driven action palettes (PRs, Jira, Git, Calendar, clipboard, dev tools).
author: Sudharsan Selvaraj

scripts.pack:bundled: rm -f resources/packs/*.garret && tsx packages/cli/src/cli.ts pack --all . --out resources/packs
scripts.pack:selftest: npm run build:selftest && bash scripts/garret-pack.sh examples/sandbox-selftest/dist examples/sandbox-selftest/sandbox-selftest.garret
scripts.pack:dir: npm run build:native && npm run pack:bundled && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build:native && npm run pack:bundled && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
